context_text: <A> and his concept of the computer was taking it apart a and not being able to put it back together / <B> wow / <A> but we had an old one around along with a printer { and he } / <B> [ uh-huh ] / <A> wasn't afraid of the technology he { grew up } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> with it and then he started to go on the internet but he started to learn his basics as far as reading and arithmetic even before kindergarten / <B> uh-huh / <A> and then ah he goes to public school and he does very well at school and then he supplements you know the usual games on the computer / <B> uh-huh
